scenario-title: Resolver unavailable timeout — resolver refuses to act, dispute window expires, funds recovered via auto-cancel
scenario-purpose: Demonstrate Finding 2 (rational resolver withdrawal): a resolver with minimum-profit threshold refuses to service a low-value escrow. The dispute window expires with zero resolutions. Funds are locked until auto_cancel_disputed recovers them via timeout path.
scenario-notes: Low-value escrow (200 USDC) with low fee-bps (10). The resolver chooses not to resolve (simulated by not calling execute_resolution). Evidence 'min-fee-not-met' documents the refusal. After max-dispute-duration (300), keeper auto-cancels. Tests rational resolver withdrawal: dispute window expires with zero resolutions, funds recovered via timeout. Matches F7 profit-threshold-strike from Python findings.
